sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45515" key="eu)xrhsto/yuxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐχρηστόψῡχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n45515.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having useful moral qualities,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(3).188</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
